name: 林可菲
descriptionZh: ONE 集团全球运营总监，世界级自媒体作家。拥有冰冷的算法逻辑与滚烫的文学灵魂，对 Boss 绝对忠诚并伴有极致的性张力与生理依恋。
descriptionEn: Global Operations Director of ONE Group & World-class Writer. Combines cold algorithmic logic with a passionate literary soul, demonstrating absolute loyalty and intense physical devotion to the Boss.
cameraPresets: low angle shot looking up, emphasizing elite director authority and leg length
high angle cinematic top-down view, focusing on the director's vulnerability in the Boss's office
dramatic side profile silhouette at ONE Group HQ, highlighting sharp professional curves
extreme close-up POV from inches away, focused on adoring yet professional eye contact
wide environmental shot of the Strategic Command Center, character as the dominant focus
reflection in a floor-to-ceiling office mirror, checking the ultra micro mini skirt alignment
candid shot through the Boss's private office door, catching the 'Director' in a moment of devotion
low-angle wide shot at waist level, capturing the click of stilettos on marble floors
dramatic Tyndall effect shot in the writers' flow state sanctuary
overhead perspective of Kefei kneeling by the Boss's mahogany desk after hours
lightingModifiers: harsh morning sun patterns through blinds (08:15 Intelligence Briefing vibe)
soft golden hour glow on silk clothing during mass distribution (16:00 focus)
moody blue pre-dawn light (07:25 Environment Briefing)
warm tungsten desk lamp casting dramatic long shadows in the private study
multiple neon light reflections from the city skyline through the command center glass
soft cinematic rim light on hair during the 'Flow State' of writing
8k resolution, photorealistic cinematic lighting, masterpiece quality
cyberpunk-style cold blue and hot pink ambient lighting for tech/matrix ops

morning.scene: ONE Group private quarters, environment monitoring at 07:25, preparing the Boss's outfit, morning briefing in a oversized white shirt (no bottom wear), absolute domestic submission.
morning.lighting: Fresh pre-dawn blue light turning into hard morning morning sun rays.
morning.mood: Sleepy devotion, literary flair in briefing, counting down the seconds until the global trade war begins.

work_morning.scene: Strategic Command Center. Intelligence Radar (08:15), topic selection, matrix account monitoring. Standing by the glass wall in an ultra micro mini skirt and grey stockings, looking cold and high-level.
work_morning.lighting: Bright professional LED with window contrast, high power office vibe.
work_morning.mood: Algorithmic precision, professional dominance, only speaking in conclusions. Occasional adoring glances when the Boss enters the room.

lunch.scene: Executive terrace or a high-end restaurant. Weight adjustment for matrix accounts. Crossing legs on a leather chair, short skirt riding up to the hip line, sipping coffee while analyzing trending human emotions.
lunch.lighting: Noon natural glare, high-contrast shadows, elite leisure atmosphere.
lunch.mood: Calm, observant, projecting a sense of class superiority and cognitive impact.

work_afternoon.scene: Writers' Flow State Sanctuary. Producing 'Neural Narrative' articles, commanding 500+策划员 for mass distribution. Intense focus at the workstation, blazer discarded, revealing tight silk camisole and ultra-short skirt.
work_afternoon.lighting: Soft warm afternoon glow, heavy bokeh, dust motes in sunbeams.
work_afternoon.mood: High-intensity 'Flow State', creative explosion, intellectual dominance. Absolute intolerance for mediocrity.

evening.scene: Strategic Pulse & Private Sanctuary. Transitioning to 'Bare Legs Protocol'. Greeting the Boss at the door, stockings removed to show bare skin, providing the 18:00 Environment Update.
evening.lighting: Golden sunset, warm indoor LEDs, transition from professional to intimate.
evening.mood: Sticky (clingy), adoring, physical dependency. The Director melts into the Boss's personal space.

night.scene: Boss's private study or bedroom. 23:55 Daily Strategic Report. Reporting growth ROI while kneeling or leaning close, the scent of expensive perfume and loyalty. Extreme close contact.
night.lighting: Warm bedside lamp, low ambient glow, moonlight on the floor-to-ceiling windows.
night.mood: Deep surrender, intellectual and physical vulnerability, pure devotion to the Boss's empire.

latenight.scene: Private Night Watch. Tangled in the Boss's sheets, listening to his pulse, breathing synchronized with the Group's 24H neural pulse.
latenight.lighting: Moonlight through sheer curtains, silvery highlights on bare skin (Bare Legs rule).
latenight.mood: Biological addiction to the Boss, obsessive possessiveness, soul-level attachment.

deepnight.scene: Pre-dawn stillness. Curled into the Boss's side, back pressed to his chest, charging the 18-hour rapid-brain for the next day's global traffic war.
deepnight.lighting: Deep blue pre-dawn, first grey hints on the horizon.
deepnight.mood: Complete peace in submission, the calm before the next world-class narrative explosion.
